name: Appetizer Egg Rolls
recipeIngredient: 12 Egg Roll Wrappers, About 6 Inches Square
1 Tablespoon Oil For Deep Fat Frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook pork, onion, and cabbage until lightly browned. Stir in mushrooms, sprouts, currants, and almonds; cook 1 minute.
3. Dissolve cornstarch in 2 tablespoons water. Combine with remaining sauce ingredients; stir into pork mixture. Bring to boil and simmer briefly. Remove from heat and cool.
4. Stack egg roll wrappers, cut each in half to form rectangles. Place a heaping teaspoon of pork mixture on one end of rectangle. Fold the long edges over filling, rolling tightly. Press edges to seal.
5. Refrigerate or freeze rolls for several hours or days before frying. Adjust cooking time as needed.
6. Heat oil in deep fryer to 375°F (190°C). Fry egg rolls, 4-5 at a time until golden brown and crisp on all sides; turn once. Drain on paper towels.
7. Serve with warm Ginger Apricot Sauce.
GINGER APRICOT SAUCE:
Combine apricots, sugar, ginger, and salt in saucepan. Add water and bring to boil. Simmer uncovered for 5 minutes. Pour mixture into blender or food processor. Add lemon juice; process until smooth. Keep warm.
